title: Django REST framework configuration is missing default rate- limiting options. This could inadvertently allow resource starvation or Denial of Service (DoS) attacks. Add 'DEFAULT_THROTTLE_CLASSES' and 'DEFAULT_THROTTLE_RATES' to add rate-limiting to your application.

extra.message: Django REST framework configuration is missing default rate- limiting options. This could inadvertently allow resource starvation or Denial of Service (DoS) attacks. Add 'DEFAULT_THROTTLE_CLASSES' and 'DEFAULT_THROTTLE_RATES' to add rate-limiting to your application.

cwe: CWE-770: Allocation of Resources Without Limits or Throttling
metadata.license: Semgrep Rules License v1.0. For more details, visit semgrep.dev/legal/rules-license

cwe: CWE-770: Allocation of Resources Without Limits or Throttling

title: Detected the use of 'RawSQL' or 'raw' indicating the execution of a non-parameterized SQL query. This could lead to a SQL injection and therefore protected information could be leaked. Instead, use Django ORM and parameterized queries before raw SQL. An example of using the Django ORM is: `People.objects.get(name='Bob')`

title: Avoiding SQL string concatenation: untrusted input concatenated with raw SQL query can result in SQL Injection. In order to execute raw query safely, prepared statement should be used. SQLAlchemy provides TextualSQL to easily used prepared statement with named parameters. For complex SQL composition, use SQL Expression Language or Schema Definition Language. In most cases, SQLAlchemy ORM will be a better option.

extra.message: Avoiding SQL string concatenation: untrusted input concatenated with raw SQL query can result in SQL Injection. In order to execute raw query safely, prepared statement should be used. SQLAlchemy provides TextualSQL to easily used prepared statement with named parameters. For complex SQL composition, use SQL Expression Language or Schema Definition Language. In most cases, SQLAlchemy ORM will be a better option.
